currentState.summary: 3-Tier Reproducible Evaluation System complete (ADR-023). Tier 1: 22 deterministic tests (D5-D9 + behavioral parity). Tier 2: frozen eval-prompt-v2.0 (no quotas, no anchoring). Tier 3: 50 behavioral scenarios (B1-B5, 10 each). 2610+ tests, 0 failures. Ready to resume behavioral sprint.

nextSteps.description: R71 behavioral sprint: use 3-tier eval system. Target B1-B5 from 3.8 → 6-7 (repair loop, domain tracking, brevity detection)
